\resumesection{PROJECTS}

\projectentry{IdxBeaver - IndexedDB Client}{Chrome Extension, IndexedDB, DevTools}{https://indexbeaver.vercel.app}{Live Link}
  \item Shipped a \textbf{Chrome DevTools extension} that turns Chrome's read-only IndexedDB inspector into a full \textbf{database client}.
  \item Lets developers \textbf{query, edit, and export} browser-stored data with \textbf{MongoDB-style filters} -- live on the \textbf{Chrome Web Store}.
\projectentryend

\projectentry{Soteira - Real Time Video Inference}{LLMs, OpenCV, YOLO, Python, ML}{https://github.com/adityaongit/soteira}{GitHub Link}
  \item Built a real-time video inference engine for live natural-language prompts, achieving \textbf{\textasciitilde{}150 ms CPU inference}.
  \item Implemented a \textbf{4-gate pipeline} (motion, scene change, object entry, NLP) using OpenCV, YOLO-nano/YOLOv8n, and ML.
\projectentryend

\projectentry{Pair Code - Developer Platform}{Node.js, WebSockets, React.js}{https://paircode-dev.vercel.app/}{Live Link}
  \item Facilitates \textbf{real-time} code synchronization across diverse \textbf{programming languages}, enabling seamless team collaboration.
  \item Features an in-built compiler, allowing users to \textbf{Compile and Run} code directly within the platform.
\projectentryend

\projectentry{SplitWatt - Electricity Bill Splitter}{Next.js, Better Auth, Umami}{https://splitwatt.vercel.app/}{Live Link}
  \item Built an open-source \textbf{electricity bill splitting} app with submeter-based cost distribution and UPI payment integration.
  \item Reached \textbf{129 countries} with \textbf{9K+ impressions} at \textbf{5.5\% CTR} -- \textasciitilde{}3x industry average -- with zero paid acquisition.
\projectentryend
